title: Simple FPS Mod
description: Simple FPS mod: shows a clean FPS counter in the top-left (updates once per second) with an easy toggle. Made for quick performance checks without extra overhead.
body:
Simple FPS Mod adds a small client-side FPS readout while you play: a compact counter in the top-left, refreshed about once per second so it stays light on your system. Use the built-in Show / Hide control to turn the readout on or off when you want a clean HUD or a quick check.

- Fabric · Minecraft 26.1.2 · Java 25+
 
- Stays out of the way

- This mod shows FPS; it is not a performance optimizer.

Built from the desire to view fps with a barebones mod, but not have to keep F3 up with all of that spam. All that live read-out effects performance. My weak laptop appreciates this.

Compatibility -

- Compatible[atleast]with: Iris / Lithium / Sodium
 
- Not compatible with: [none yet found]

License wise: ARR to limit rebuilds/forks/modifications/third-party tampering.

Use in videos/modpacks/streams/anything else freely, just don't copy and publish otherwise.
